title: [TC]: Check if the job remains the same as typed in the first search field from the homepage
author: DeedeeDL
userStoryLabel: US11 : As a user, I want to search for jobs using different criteria (e.g., company, location, work mode, industry) so that I can see job listings matching my criteria
description: This test case verifies that the job keyword entered in the first search field on the homepage is preserved correctly after initiating the search. The system should display the same job term in the search field on the results page without altering or losing the input.
descriptionExcerpt: This test case verifies that the job keyword entered in the first search field on the homepage is preserved correctly after initiating the search. The system s…

title: [TC]: Check the behavior when deleting the search query after results are displayed
author: DeedeeDL
userStoryLabel: US11 : As a user, I want to search for jobs using different criteria (e.g., company, location, work mode, industry) so that I can see job listings matching my criteria
description: This test case verifies that the application handles correctly the scenario where a user performs a search and then deletes the query from the search input field. The system should update the UI accordingly without errors and display the appropriate state (e.g., empty state or default suggestions).
descriptionExcerpt: This test case verifies that the application handles correctly the scenario where a user performs a search and then deletes the query from the search input fie…

title: [TC]: Check if the search history is cleared after refreshing the page
author: DeedeeDL
userStoryLabel: US11 : As a user, I want to search for jobs using different criteria (e.g., company, location, work mode, industry) so that I can see job listings matching my criteria
description: This test verifies whether the search history is cleared after refreshing the page. A search is performed and confirmed to appear in the history, then the page is refreshed to check if the history is removed. The expected result is that no previously searched terms are displayed.
descriptionExcerpt: This test verifies whether the search history is cleared after refreshing the page. A search is performed and confirmed to appear in the history, then the page…
